documentation.description:
.. note:: This unit is internal: only Langkit and Langkit-generated
libraries are supposed to use it.

array_types.name: Token_Family_Name_Array
array_types.code:
type Token_Family_Name_Array is
  array (Token_Family_Index range <>) of Text_Access;

array_types.name: Token_Kind_Descriptor_Array
array_types.code:
type Token_Kind_Descriptor_Array is
  array (Token_Kind_Index range <>) of Token_Kind_Descriptor;

record_types.name: Token_Kind_Descriptor

access_types.name: Bytes_Access
access_types.code: type Bytes_Access is not null access constant String;

documentation.description: Reference to a static string of bytes

access_types.name: Bytes_Access_Or_Null
access_types.code: type Bytes_Access_Or_Null is access constant String;

documentation.description: Reference to a static string of bytes

access_types.name: Text_Access
access_types.code: type Text_Access is not null access constant Text_Type;

documentation.description:
Reference to a static Unicode string. Used in descriptor tables whenever
we need to provide a name.

access_types.name: Text_Access_Or_Null
access_types.code: type Text_Access_Or_Null is access constant Text_Type;

documentation.description:
Reference to a static Unicode string. Used in descriptor tables whenever
we need to provide a name.

access_types.name: Token_Family_Name_Array_Access
access_types.code:
type Token_Family_Name_Array_Access is
  not null access constant Token_Family_Name_Array;

access_types.name: Token_Kind_Descriptor_Array_Access
access_types.code:
type Token_Kind_Descriptor_Array_Access is
  not null access constant Token_Kind_Descriptor_Array;

documentation.description:
Reference to a statically allocated String. Used in descriptor tables
whenever we need to provide string for debug (compatible with
Ada.Text_IO).
